blocks.body: As... As / Not As... As — Equality and inequality with as... as and not as... as.

{ "title": "10. Short summary", "items": [ "As…as — to express equality: He is as tall as me.", "Not as…as — to express inequality: He is not as tall as me.", "Basic form — between as…as always basic adjective/adverb (not comparative).", "Both as — both as are required in the construction.", "Soft way — not as…as is a more polite form than comparative.", "Stable expressions — as soon as possible, as far as I know, as long as, as well as.", "Extensions - you can add multipliers (twice as), amplifiers (nearly as), use in questions." ] }
